form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Only had one start last preparation second last of 11 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on May 30 over 1500m, 13 len behind Bring Forth with 59.5kg at $14. When resuming last campaign second last of 9 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on September 8 2024 over 1300m, 12 len behind Rue De Royale carrying 58kg at $101. Finished seventh in a Caulfield Heath trial over 1000m on March 26. Prefer to see how he returns.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 3rd of 11 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1400m, slow going 4 len behind Lowestoft carrying 59.5kg at $6.50. Previously second-up 6th of 11 at Seymour Mdn-Sw on September 11 over 1600m, slow going 2 len behind Azazel with 59.5kg at $51. Back in good shape and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Gelding by Cosmic Force on debut. Fitter for a jump-out on March 30 at Camperdown when finished sixth. 1600m on debut a tough ask but jumpouts suggest he'll want ground long-term.

form.formComment: Was at very long odds at debut, 8th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1400m, on a wet track; 10 len behind On The Prowl with 59kg at $101. Won't find this any easier so he must improve sharply.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 7th of 9 at Avoca 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 18 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Brave Charm with 58kg at $31. Went for a spell before returning got back early 7th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1300m, 9 len behind Abby's Crossword with 59kg at $31. Form doesn't look good enough and has to do it from the wide gate.

form.formComment: At debut, raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1461m, slow going 4.5 len behind Crazy Town carrying 59kg at $21. Will take a lot from that hitout and shapes as one to consider.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 11 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Lufitaah with 58kg at $3.40. The start before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Seymour 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 20 over 1600m, 0.5 len behind Lunar Force carrying 58kg at $4.60. Progressing nicely and is sure to prove tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the straight.
Near the 50m shifted out when awkwardly placed on the heels of Ballistic Blue.

form.formComment: First starter by San Padre out of Zanus. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Keen to see under race conditions.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming ran last of 10 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1450m, 6 len behind Man Of The Sea carrying 57.5kg at $4. Heading the right way and gets her chance to get off the mark.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd of 11 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1500m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Wonboyn with 57.5kg at $4.80. The run before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on February 13 over 1450m, 0.8 len behind Crespiano with 57.5kg at $5.50. Well placed. Should be at her top now and is expected to be in the finish.
